settings.target: FKBP12 (FKBP1A, 107 res, PDBbind immunophilin drug target) + small-molecule inhibitor SB3 (CCD, 33 heavy atoms, MW 449.59); msa: empty (single-sequence). affinity_pred_value is the MW-corrected log10(IC50) in uM, ensemble mean over 5 affinity diffusion samples and the two affinity heads.

provenance: Harvested from a FRESH 2026-07-18 qb2 reference run (/home/ttuser/affinity_bench/ref_seed{0,1,2}, mtime 2026-07-18 18:3x). Per-seed affinity_pred_value: seed0=-0.515625, seed1=-0.515625, seed2=-0.53125 (probability_binary 0.9296875 all three). The reference is unusually self-consistent (seeds 0 and 1 identical; R floor = 0.0104 log10-IC50 units) because affinity_pred_value is already an ensemble mean over 5 diffusion samples, so per-seed variance is small. Boltz-2 affinity hardcodes recycling_steps=5 (boltz/main.py predict_affinity_args), independent of --recycling_steps; the device port hardcodes the same 5 (tt_bio/main.py aff_kwargs), so --recycling_steps 3 gives identical settings on both sides (structure recycling=3, affinity recycling=5). Structure CIFs (best-sample affinity_fkg_model_0.cif, the single CIF the official affinity path writes) added to seed{0,1,2}/structures/affinity_fkg.cif on 2026-07-19 (pass 5 / P3) so scripts/boltz2_affinity_parity.py can score ligand-pose RMSD + pocket-lDDT alongside the scalar affinity — copied from the original qb2 reference output dirs (no reference re-run).
invalidation_rule: Regenerate this fixture ONLY when the pinned reference_commit/version changes or the settings above change. For any other change (device seeds, device code, release tag) the fixture is reused as-is and only the device side re-runs.
